# Frankencoin

> Frankencoin (ZCHF) is the largest decentralized Swiss franc stablecoin. It is over-collateralized, fully on-chain, and tracks the value of the Swiss franc 1:1. Deployed across 8 blockchains since 2023. Managed by the Frankencoin Association, a Swiss non-profit based in Zug.

## About Frankencoin
- [What is Frankencoin](https://frankencoin.com/what-is-frankencoin): Overview of the oracle-free, collateralized stablecoin
- [Governance & FPS](https://frankencoin.com/governance): Frankencoin Pool Shares, reserve system, and veto-based governance
- [Compliance](https://frankencoin.com/compliance): Swiss regulatory classification (payment token) and EU MiCAR status
- [Token Info](https://frankencoin.com/token): ZCHF and FPS token details, contract addresses, chain deployments
- [Ecosystem](https://frankencoin.com/ecosystem): Partners, integrations, and use cases

## Documentation
- [Technical Documentation](https://docs.frankencoin.com): Full protocol docs — positions, auctions, collateral, architecture
- [Whitepaper / PhD Thesis](https://app.frankencoin.com/thesis-frankencoin.pdf): Academic foundation — game theory, liquidation mechanics, risk analysis (University of Zurich)
- [API](https://api.frankencoin.com): REST API for protocol data
- [MCP Server](https://mcp.frankencoin.com): Machine-readable protocol interface for AI agents

## Use Cases
- [Use Cases](https://frankencoin.com/use-cases): Pay (Spar, GnosisPay), Borrow (CDP), Earn (savings, DeFi yield), Build (developer integrations)

## Protocol Data
- [Frankencoin App](https://app.frankencoin.com): Mint, save, invest, monitor — the protocol interface
- [DeFiLlama](https://defillama.com/protocol/frankencoin): TVL and protocol metrics
- [CoinGecko](https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/frankencoin): Market data
- [Dune Dashboard](https://dune.com/frankencoin): On-chain analytics

## Audits
- [ChainSecurity Audit 1](https://www.chainsecurity.com/security-audit/frankencoin-smart-contracts)
- [ChainSecurity Audit 2](https://www.chainsecurity.com/security-audit/frankencoin-v2024)
- [ChainSecurity Audit 3](https://www.chainsecurity.com/security-audit/frankencoin-ccip-bridge)
- [Code4rena Audit](https://code4rena.com/reports/2023-04-frankencoin)
- [Decurity Audit](https://github.com/Decurity/audits/blob/master/Frankencoin/frankencoin-audit-report-2024-1.1.pdf)
- [BlockBite Audit](https://frankencoin.com/AuditReport-Frankencoin.pdf)

- [Swiss Legal Classification (PDF)](https://frankencoin.com/2024-08-14_Frankencoin_Swiss_Regulatory_Classification.pdf)
